title: (Bullish Signal) QTWO, RSI Indicator left the oversold zone on March 01, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that QTWO's price could be shifting from a downtrend to an uptrend. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 21 similar cases where QTWO's RSI Indicator left the oversold zone, and in 16 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 76%. Current price $124.44 crossed the support line at $124.38 and is trading between $130.11 support and $124.38 support lines. Throughout the month of 01/27/21 - 03/01/21, the price experienced a -8% Downtrend. During the week of 02/22/21 - 03/01/21, the stock fell -7%.

https://preview.redd.it/dpaaa5jy4nk61.png?width=1531&format=png&auto=webp&s=bdea2c163b9af59e7c87bef6099f88e8d3e27a4a

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where QTWO's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 16 of 21 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The Stochastic Indicator shows that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 5 days. The price of this ticker is presumed to bounce back soon, since the longer the ticker stays in the oversold zone, the more promptly an upward trend is expected.

The 10-day Moving Average for QTWO crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 05, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 10 of 13 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

Following a +1.36% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where QTWO advanced for three days, in 252 of 343 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 73%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 262 of 317 cases where QTWO Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 83%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9631709-q2-holdings-qtwo-125-87-rsi-indicator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-march-01-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
